mapper.select:
SELECT target_type, target_id, like_count, update_time FROM like_counts
WHERE
(target_type = #{t.targetType} AND target_id = #{t.targetId})
WHERE 1 = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO like_counts(target_type, target_id, like_count, update_time) VALUES(#{po.targetType}, #{po.targetId}, #{po.likeCount}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE like_count = VALUES(like_count), update_time = NOW()
